EW

Elsa Wan

Malaysia’s national women’s No. 1.

Profile

Full nameElsa Wan (Wan Elsa)
NationalityMalaysia
CategoryWTA / ITF Women’s World Tennis Tour
Born8 December 2003
PlaysNot publicly confirmed
Current rankingMalaysia’s national women’s No. 1 (2026); WTA/ITF numeric ranking not confirmed in our sources
Highest rankingNot publicly confirmed in available sources
Main eventsITF Women’s World Tennis Tour (W15–W25); Malaysian national team

Recent results

Competing on the ITF Women’s World Tennis Tour during 2026, including W15 events in Thailand.

Career highlights

  • Malaysia’s current national women’s No. 1 (2026)
  • Competes on the ITF Women’s World Tennis Tour
  • Junior pedigree including an ITF Junior (J5 Singapore) singles final and doubles title (2017)

Playing style

Not publicly confirmed.

Sources

  • WTA profile
  • ITF profile
  • Tennis Explorer profile

Compiled from public sources. Where a detail is not publicly available it is marked as such rather than estimated. Spot an error? Let us know.
